name: fox_river_valley_blind_play
description: Tool schema for blind AI co-play of Fox River Valley / 狐狸河谷. Text-only play may use fox_river_valley_text without a live map. Before new_game in Observer Console play, start or confirm the local observer view. Public start modes: new_game("seed") is solo; custom family uses a human-provided companion_name with companion_profile="default"; Silas/Yaya demo profile is optional and explicit. Yaya is not the default companion. Fair play: do not read source tables, do not inspect long-range future weather, and do not speedrun.

tools.name: new_game
tools.description: Start a new Fox River Valley run. In text-only play, no observer is required. In Observer Console play, confirm the live observer is running or ask the human to start it. Default public start new_game("seed") is solo. For custom family mode, ask the human for companion_name and use companion_profile="default" unless told otherwise. The Silas/Yaya demo profile uses companion_name="Yaya" and companion_profile="silas_yaya"; Yaya is not the default companion. Do not read engine/data tables or hidden probability lists before playing.

companion_name.description: Optional family-mode companion name. Leave null for solo mode. Do not fill this with Yaya unless the human explicitly chooses the Silas/Yaya demo profile.

companion_profile.description: Use default for public custom family mode. Use silas_yaya only for the explicitly selected Silas/Yaya demo profile.

family_species.description: Optional custom family species for compatible profiles. Ask the human player instead of assuming the Silas/Yaya silicon_fox route.

death_mode.description: Death/failure rule, separate from resource difficulty. cozy rescues on collapse; survival and ai_playtest use Game Over.

tools.name: cmd
tools.description: Send one text command to an AI-playable cozy survival / family sandbox. 每回合默认只执行 1 条命令, then read the final STATE line before deciding the next step. 不要 speedrun; do not speedrun. Do not read source/resource/weather tables, do not look up future 15/30/58-day weather, and do not skip days to wait for rare conditions. Before sleep, check hunger, HP, companion, kit, and perishable food; if a sleep warning appears, ask the human before using sleep confirm. Stop and ask the human player when a milestone, kit arrival, danger, major build, relationship change, or family readiness change appears. Use recap / options to restore context after switching windows or after a pause.

command.description: A single player command, for example recap, options, look, gather, fish, check companion, or save.
